actions.value:
Sweeping funds from a Private Key can be easily accomplished by following these steps:

 

- Login to Edge and open the main menu (≡) in the top-right.

- Tap on Scan QR.

- Scan your Private Key QR code. (Alternatively, you may scan a QR from your photo Album, or press Enter to manually type or paste in the private key)

- Specify which wallet you'd like to sweep your coins into (if there are multiple available), and

- Tap Import. 🎉
 

 

This feature is commonly used for easily retrieving funds off of a paper wallet. Please note, some blockchain fees exist whenever creating a on-chain transaction. Edge makes no profit from this. If you are trying to sweep a seed phrase, importing your seed words would be more appropriate, as sweeping only works for a single private key.
 

Let us know if you have any more questions.
